sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: A facilitated workshop applying observation and escalation judgement to simulated ward scenarios.

content.title: Scenario walkthrough
content.learner_instructions: Work in pairs. Complete the checklist for each scenario before discussing escalation.

materials.checklist:
- ☐ Confirm patient identity
- ☐ Note vital signs trend
- ☐ Identify escalation trigger

scenarios.title: Scenario A
scenarios.content: Patient reports increasing breathlessness; observations borderline.

content.expected_output: Completed checklist plus one escalation rationale.

items.stem: Which observation most strongly supports immediate escalation?
